CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2012 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jan-08-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Robert Cohen, Esq. for Plaintiff. Matter reported settled. An Order to Show Cause re CRC 3.1385 is set to JAN-08-2013 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Robert Cohen, Esq. for Plaintiff also appearing specially for Defendant. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to NOV-20-2013 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: Appearance for Plaintiff. The Arbitrator's jurisdiction is extended to 8/27/2012. The OSC is re-set to 10/2/2012 at 2:00 PM, in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)
